content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 35.5%) with broad participation (Breadth: 7/8 sectors positive). Market favours cyclicals and banks into week close.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Banking & Finance leading: HALKB (1W: +7.89% | 1M: +24.57%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +5.37% | 1M: +0.08%) ABOVE TREND. Construction & REIT and Technology show follow-through: TKFEN (1W: +7.74% | 1M: +11.05%) ABOVE TREND, TCELL (1W: +6.83% | 1M: -6.34%) RECOVERY.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Holding & Investment is the lone laggard: DOHOL (1W: -2.81% | 1M: -2.81%) BELOW TREND. Energy has dispersion with large winners but key names underperform: TUPRS (1W: -1.69% | 1M: -14.24%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -4.89% | 1M: -12.85%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
TRALT (1W: +10.93% | 1M: +18.79%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +10.75% | 1M: +32.24%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +2.58%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: +7.89% | 1M: +24.57%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +7.74% | 1M: +11.05%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
ENKAI (1W: -5.52% | 1M: -10.51%) BELOW TREND, GUBRF (1W: -5.00% | 1M: -4.91%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -4.89% | 1M: -12.85%) BELOW TREND, ASELS (1W: -4.73% | 1M: -15.21%) BELOW TREND, DOHOL (1W: -2.81% | 1M: -2.81%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
Top 1W movers: TRALT (1W: +10.93% | 1M: +18.79%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +10.75% | 1M: +32.24%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +2.58%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: +7.89% | 1M: +24.57%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +7.74% | 1M: +11.05%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks confirming strength and leading the market; HALKB (1W: +7.89% | 1M: +24.57%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +5.37% | 1M: +0.08%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -5.02%) RECOVERY and YKBNK (1W: +6.15% | 1M: -2.44%) RECOVERY show momentum but mixed 1M confirmations.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: EREGL (1W: +3.74% | 1M: +9.20%) ABOVE TREND and FROTO (1W: +5.29% | 1M: -9.64%) RECOVERY are outperforming, while ASELS (1W: -4.73% | 1M: -15.21%) BELOW TREND and VESTL (1W: -1.21% | 1M: -6.33%) BELOW TREND lag.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy shows bifurcation — small-cap winners lead while majors lag: TRALT (1W: +10.93% | 1M: +18.79%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +10.75% | 1M: +32.24%) ABOVE TREND, versus TUPRS (1W: -1.69% | 1M: -14.24%) BELOW TREND and PETKM (1W: -4.89% | 1M: -12.85%) BELOW TREND.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk‑on tilt: overweight Banking & cyclicals (select Construction and Retail leaders) and take profits/trim large losers in Energy and Holding names; maintain selective exposure to momentum winners and avoid weak defensives that lack 1M confirmation.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
TRALT (1W: +10.93% | 1M: +18.79%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +10.75% | 1M: +32.24%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: +7.89% | 1M: +24.57%) ABOVE TREND, TCELL (1W: +6.83% | 1M: -6.34%) RECOVERY, ENKAI (1W: -5.52% | 1M: -10.51%) BELOW TREND.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Banking & Finance for confirmation of leadership, Construction & REIT for cyclicals continuation, and Energy & Chemicals for dispersion and mean‑reversion trades.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 momentum around the recent weekly highs for breakout confirmation and the last major swing lows for support; macro catalysts: CBRT communications, CPI prints, hard‑currency flows and any regional geopolitical headlines that could flip risk sentiment.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK‑ON tape with normal vol (35.5%) and broad sector participation (7/8 positive); banks and select cyclicals lead while holdings and some energy majors lag. Trade the momentum winners (TRALT, HEKTS, HALKB) and trim exposure to lagging energy/holding names given weak 1M confirmation.
